reviews.review_description: there is potential for this game, however as of now it is horrible, you get stuck on objects, colliders prevent possible cleaning, and dirt doesn't completely go away and it doesn't approve a refund if it's not enjoyable.
If it was possible to give zero stars then I would. Absolutely awful app, graphics are terrible, not user friendly whatsoever!

reviews.review_title: Was not relaxing was not therapeutic
reviews.review_description: I tried the game out but there were some issues I couldn't get over like the fact that for some odd reason I stopped being able to pick up any tools. I'd turn off my headset return to the game and the issue resides I even changed my boundary to make sure i was short enough to pick things up off the floor and nope. Still couldn't grab anything they just floated around me my tool belt wasnt even on my waist but everytime I reached for it it was like running from me or something. So I found something cheaper and tried to get my refund so I can pick up another  game I've been wanting on here and they denied it. I'm guessing because it took more than 2 hours for me to realize this game sucked booty and wasn't going to stop tripping! Guess my patience should've been thinner *shruggs*

developer_response.body:
Hi Marsha430, 
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your experience with our game. We apologize for any inconvenience you encountered.

We are going to check all mentioned problems as it seems that this particular issue is not something that our players or our internal tests have encountered before.

In terms of the gameplay experience, we recommend trying the standing mode for the best possible experience.

Please join us on Discord where you can talk with us directly.
DISCORD: https://discord.gg/j4ySVzdCYQ

We would like to extend an invitation to give our game a second chance. We are confident that you will have a better experience and discover the enjoyable aspects our game has to offer 😀.

Regards
GameFormatic Team

reviews.review_description:
As a car lover, I couldn't resist trying out this game, and it exceeded my expectations! I must say, the power wash feature is quite satisfying. The graphics is ok. While I wished for more car choices, the overall experience is  fine.

I would probable recommend this game but Im looking forward for updates and bug fixes.

developer_response.body:
engels75👋,
Thank you for your positive feedback! We're glad to hear that you enjoyed the game🙂 We appreciate your suggestion regarding more car choices.

We invite you to join our Discord community to stay connected and receive updates directly. 

DISCORD: https://discord.gg/j4ySVzdCYQ

Also, stay tuned as we have some exciting news! We'll be releasing an update soon with fixes and improvements based on user feedback. We hope you'll continue to enjoy the game even more. Thank you again for your support!

reviews.review_description: The game has potential but it needs tutorials because I was and still am lost on how to play the game

developer_response.body:
Hi Dillan_vr, 
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us  :)
The game has some clues and posters on the walls that explain each process. In addition, after grabbing the tools, you can also pay attention to the pop-up in place of the watch. 
If you have other questions or concerns, please join us on Discord where you can talk with us directly.
DISCORD: https://discord.gg/j4ySVzdCYQ

Regards,
GameFormatic Team

reviews.review_description:
In its current state, the game is pretty fun to play for a bit, and the mechanics are decent, the physics feel better than previously, and it feels more fun to play.
Glad I reinstalled and gave it another shot after the update!
(Improved from 3 to four stars and removed the pressure washing part because that was just me being dumb)

reviews.review_title: Game is pretty bad at the minute
reviews.review_description:
I bought the game because i want to work as a car detailer and thought it would be good to see how it is in VR. Turns out the game isn't what I expected.

I'm not angry at the gameplay, I'm mad about how they handled the game tutorial, there's no official tutorial in the game but there's a guide in the game that helps you through the job and it sucks, there's no instructions there's just very vague pictures that slightly resemble what you need to do.

I would say to the developers to add some sort of voice guidance that guides you through the game at the start because it's extremely confusing.

I'll be refunding this game and if they improve the game I might think about buying it again. I'll be going to my pc and buying the PC version instead.

Very disappointed.

developer_response.body:
Hey S1rEnder 👋
EDITED / UPDATE 1.1

We are pleased to inform you that we have recently released an update addressing several issues, including bug fixes, and performance improvements. We have also worked diligently to enhance the graphics. We added a tool belt, which we believe adds depth and convenience to the gameplay. Additionally, we have introduced an achievements system to provide extra challenges, aiming to create a more engaging and rewarding experience for our players. We have improved the tutorial🙂.

We genuinely appreciate the valuable insights and suggestions from players like you. Your feedback has played a significant role in shaping the improvements we have made.

We would be happy if you could take some time to revisit the game and see the progress we have made. We are confident that the updates and enhancements will provide a more enjoyable and satisfying experience. Your continued support means a lot to us, and we hope you find the changes to be in line with your expectations. Even if you have returned the game, we hope you will come back to it or better evaluate our efforts to improve it by rating it higher.

Once again, we thank you for your feedback and for being part of our community🙂. If you have any further suggestions, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. We are committed to providing the best possible gaming experience for all our players.

DISCORD: https://discord.gg/j4ySVzdCYQ

EDITED:
We appreciate your feedback on our game. We're sorry to hear about the difficulties you encountered and your dissatisfaction with the tutorial. Your feedback is important to us, and we'll take it into account for future updates. As the game has just been released, we value every single comment from players, and we're committed to making improvements based on your input. We hope you'll consider giving the game another chance and reevaluating it at least as positive as you did initially. Thank you for your support, and we look forward to providing you with an even better gaming experience in the future🙂.

...
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts on Car Detailing Simulator. We appreciate your support and enthusiasm for the game. Our team is dedicated to delivering an immersive and realistic experience, and we're glad to hear that we're on the right track. Keep on enjoying the game and happy detailing!

and please join us on our Discord server😀  
DISCORD: https://discord.gg/j4ySVzdCYQ 
We hope to see you there and thank you again for your support!

reviews.review_description: I’m a car detailer professionally and the entire process of doing the cars is insanely inaccurate do not purchase this if you’d like to learn to do this field of work I’m also sad to say that the game is buggy as all heck I can’t tell you how many times I had to restart the game because I glitched through the floor or got stuck or lost a tool or car seat could see it be a fun game but it needs some real TLC
I bought this game so I can see what car detailing would be like and I didn’t expect the game not to be specific with the directions overall the game needs to be fixed
So the physics are a problem and other wise it’s good
So I got a job but am still waiting on the customer to arrive bug or not?

developer_response.body:
Hello METALx79,
Thanks for the information. We're sorry that you encountered difficulties. We are aware of the existence of this bug and we are working on fixing it. It will be addressed in the upcoming update. For now, restarting the application should help. Thank you for your patience.

reviews.review_description: I'm over here trying to empty out the vacuum filter and I can't which makes my game unplayable and physics are terrible and I keep glitching and having to restart the game, do not purchase
Its bad the first job is hard the game thinks its simple. Do not install

reviews.review_description: I cant even get past the loading screen after start up

developer_response.body:
Hi iwantyonnoodles24👋,

EDITED / UPDATE 1.1
Is there still a problem after our last advice on how to solve the problem? We hope not.

We wanted to inform you that we have recently released an update addressing various improvements in the game. This includes bug fixes, performance enhancements, enhanced graphics, a tool belt, an achievements system for added challenges, and an improved tutorial. 

We hope you will consider giving the updated game another try - and rate it higher. Your support and feedback are greatly appreciated. 

If you have any further suggestions or encounter any issues, please let us know. Thanks.

..............
We invite you to get in touch with us, preferably on our Discord channel where our entire development team is available. We're here to assist you. There is a high likelihood that the issue is not caused by the game itself. If you prefer not to join Discord, you can also reach out to us via email at hello@gameformatic.com

At the moment, you can certainly try restarting your headset. If that doesn't help, you can consider reinstalling the application. Please let us know your progress. We sincerely hope that these steps will help improve your perception of the game, as it truly deserves a much better rating.

DISCORD: https://discord.gg/j4ySVzdCYQ
